title: Monstrous Creature
text:
!!Shooting
Monstrous Creatures can fire up to two of their weapons each Shooting phase – they must, of course, fire both at the same target. They may never Go to Ground, voluntarily or otherwise.

!!Special Rules
Monstrous Creatures have the [[Fear]], [[Hammer of Wrath]], [[Move Through Cover]], [[Relentless]] and [[Smash]] special rules.

!!Tyranid Monstrous Creatures
<$list filter="[tag[Monstrous Creature]sort[title]]">

*<$link><$view field=title/></$link>

</$list>
creator: Jeanbeaux
description: Some creatures are just too big to fit into the ordinary Infantry unit category. These are towering giants that are capable of crushing a tank – like the Tyranid Carnifex, a creature bioengineered and evolved to become a living battering ram. While Monstrous Creatures use many of the Infantry rules, their size and destructive capability make them a lot more dangerous.
